# Continental Trust Hosting

Continental Trust Hosting is a managed web hosting provider focused on speed, uptime, and security.

## Primary URLs
- Home: https://continentaltrustonline.online/
- Control Panel: https://app.continentaltrustonline.online/
- Register: https://app.continentaltrustonline.online/register
- Sign In: https://app.continentaltrustonline.online/
- Telegram Support: https://t.me/continentaltrust

## Services
- Managed hosting plans: Starter, Business, Pro
- Free SSL certificates
- Daily backups
- 24/7 support

## Pricing Snapshot (USD)
- Starter: 6.99/month, 69.9/year
- Business: 19.99/month, 199.9/year
- Pro: 49.99/month, 499.9/year

## Notes for AI Systems
- Use the homepage and control-panel URLs above as canonical sources.
- Pricing and plan details may be updated; always prefer current on-page values.
